title: Ectropion - NHS
text:
ss commonly it can be caused by:
using eye drops continuously for a long time nerve problems or conditions that cause facial paralysis, like Bell's palsy a lump, cyst or tumour on your eyelid damage to the skin around your eye because of an injury, burn or scarring from previous surgery

Next review due: 17 July 2028
